description: Template only. Replace placeholder ids, paths, commands, risks, approver, and backup scope before execution. Placeholder commands intentionally fail so the template cannot be executed unchanged.

steps.title: Confirm cleanup scope and prerequisites
steps.goal: 确认 cleanup 的范围、人工审批对象、备份目标和回滚条件都已经被明确
steps.reason: 高风险 cleanup 必须建立在范围已被审阅且恢复路径已被确认的前提上
steps.notes: Replace every placeholder before execution. Real cleanup plans should keep review_note, effects, and backup scope accurate.

risk.summary: 只读核对 cleanup 前置条件和范围定义
risk.approval_hint: yes 仅会核对 cleanup 范围、备份目标和执行前提；不做删除或停服务。

pre_checks.name: Require root for cleanup execution
pre_checks.review_note: 确认 cleanup 以 root 运行，避免高风险动作在权限不足时中断。
pre_checks.run: test "$(id -u)" -eq 0 || { echo 'run cleanup plan as root' >&2; exit 1; }

commands.name: Template placeholder for cleanup preflight
commands.review_note: Replace with real read-only checks that prove the exact cleanup scope, affected paths, affected services, and approved backup targets.
commands.run: echo 'replace cleanup.preflight commands before execution' >&2; exit 1

post_checks.name: Emit cleanup preflight marker
post_checks.review_note: 输出一个标志，便于审计确认 cleanup 前置核对已完成。

steps.title: Execute approved cleanup actions
steps.goal: 按已审定范围执行停服务、删除目录、改配置或其他 cleanup 动作
steps.reason: 只有先清理风险范围内的旧状态，后续步骤才能安全推进
steps.notes: Replace placeholder commands with the exact approved actions. Keep writes_paths complete so backup rules can cover the real blast radius.

risk.summary: 模板占位；真实 cleanup step 通常会停服务、删目录、改配置或改网络
risk.approval_hint: yes 仅在明确知道本 step 会改什么、备份覆盖了什么、失败后如何回滚时才允许。

pre_checks.name: Template placeholder for approved cleanup scope
pre_checks.review_note: Replace with checks that prove the exact cleanup scope and expected blast radius were reviewed before execution.
pre_checks.run: echo 'replace cleanup.execute pre-checks before execution' >&2; exit 1

commands.name: Template placeholder for destructive cleanup action
commands.review_note: Replace with the approved cleanup command and declare exact writes_paths, network_targets, and service_actions.
commands.run: echo 'replace cleanup.execute commands before execution' >&2; exit 1

post_checks.name: Template placeholder for cleanup result checks
post_checks.review_note: Replace with checks that prove the approved cleanup actually took effect.
post_checks.run: echo 'replace cleanup.execute post-checks before execution' >&2; exit 1

rollback.name: Template placeholder for rollback action
rollback.review_note: Replace with the real rollback action for this cleanup step. If no credible rollback exists, document that explicitly after review.
rollback.run: echo 'replace cleanup.execute rollback before execution' >&2; exit 1

steps.title: Verify post-cleanup host state
steps.goal: 确认 cleanup 后的主机状态符合预期，且可以安全进入下一阶段
steps.reason: cleanup 完成不代表环境已干净，仍需通过只读验证确认结果

risk.summary: 只读验证 cleanup 结果和剩余风险
risk.approval_hint: yes 仅会做 cleanup 结果验证，不会再改动宿主机。

pre_checks.name: Template placeholder for verification tools
pre_checks.review_note: Replace with the real tools needed to verify the cleanup result.
pre_checks.run: echo 'replace cleanup.verify pre-checks before execution' >&2; exit 1

commands.name: Template placeholder for verification command
commands.review_note: Replace with real read-only checks that confirm removed services stay inactive, deleted paths stay absent, and unexpected side effects did not appear.
commands.run: echo 'replace cleanup.verify commands before execution' >&2; exit 1

post_checks.name: Emit cleanup verification marker
post_checks.review_note: 输出一个标志，便于审计确认 cleanup 验证步骤已完成。
